title: Soft Gingerbread
body:
Children love this warm with butter or whipped cream. Halves easily.

· ½ cup butter
· ½ cup sugar
· 1 egg, well beaten
· 1 cup molasses
· 1 cup hot water
· 3 cups flour
· 1½ teaspoons baking soda
· 1 teaspoon each: salt, cinnamon, ginger, cloves

source.label: Fannie Merritt Farmer · The Boston Cooking-School Cook Book · 1896
source.ref: Fannie Merritt Farmer · The Boston Cooking-School Cook Book · 1896
